title: Inkboi's Rewrite
description: This modpack is the most confusing but somehow fun way to play Minecraft. This modpack contains create,Valkyrien skies and alot more.
body:
### This modpack is a mashup of lots of mods some you might know some you might not know. 
**updates when needed**

<font size="4"> BEFORE RUNNING USE JAVA21 AS CUSTOM INSTALLATION FOR THE O,Q,P
<font size="3"> IT WON'T EVEN BOOT UP ON JAVA 19

## I recommend for 60fps settings a:

- Intel i7 2600,
- GTX1050ti,
- 8GB of ram 
- and maybe a ssd 
  
## what mods to expect?
- Create,
- figura
- sodium (with more options and alternative menu)
- iris 
- indium
- valkyrien skies
- Libaries ofc
- sodium,iris,indium and others 
- Essential to play with friends
- carryon
- and others

## on the why should you download this modpack - i'd say :
For starters, extended support - I plan to keep this modpack updated and fresh by tweaking things weekly to add new features and make sure there are never errors or crashes from it.

## Is it even fun?
Yes, is fun to play around and people beta testing it had lots of fun

# Special thanks to:
- clau7486 on discord for helping out in the description
- jellysquid for making it possible to run this modpack at all
- and lots more
